name: Darwinian Evolver
license: AGPL-3.0 reported by research; treat as reference-only unless separately reviewed
omp_native_mapping: Represent concepts through local TypeScript interfaces and quarantined run artifacts only.
materialization_policy: No source code materialization; Phase 1 may only use spec-derived abstractions.

name: OpenEvolve
omp_native_mapping: Defer optimizer concepts until a later approved plan; keep Phase 1 deterministic.
materialization_policy: Registry record only; no code copy or runtime dependency.

name: Voyager
omp_native_mapping: Map durable learning to explicit candidate reports and manual promotion gates.
materialization_policy: Registry record only; no code copy or runtime dependency.

name: GenericAgent
omp_native_mapping: Keep capability abstractions as registry knowledge until OMP-native specs approve integration.
materialization_policy: Registry record only; no code copy or runtime dependency.

name: MemSkill
omp_native_mapping: Represent memory-related ideas as future GraphRAG-backed plans, not Phase 1 runtime changes.
materialization_policy: Registry record only; no code copy or runtime dependency.
